sourceMovie.title: Operation Condor
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Operation Condor works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Rundown
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Operation Condor clicked for you, The Rundown (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Operation Condor clicked for you, Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Operation Condor?
faq.answer: Try The Rundown, Raiders of the Lost Ark, Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny—each shares DNA with Operation Condor while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Operation Condor?
faq.answer: Operation Condor (1991) is best described as Action, Adventure, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Operation Condor part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Armour of God Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
